changes.value:
## What
Implement the module framework (registry, dispatch) and all 10 Claude modules that read data from the stdin JSON.

Key files:
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/module.rs` (new) тАФ `Segment` struct, `ModuleFn` type alias, `build_registry()` returning `HashMap<&str, ModuleFn>`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/mod.rs` (new) тАФ re-exports
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/directory.rs` тАФ basename of `input.workspace.current_dir`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/model.rs` тАФ short model name from `input.model`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/context_bar.rs` тАФ progress bar from `input.context_window.used_percentage` with color thresholds from config
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/cost.rs` тАФ `$X.XX` from `input.cost.total_cost_usd`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/session.rs` тАФ first 8 chars of `input.session_id`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/vim_mode.rs` тАФ NORMAL/INSERT from `input.vim.mode`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/agent.rs` тАФ `input.agent.name`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/worktree.rs` тАФ `input.worktree.branch` or `.name`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/lines.rs` тАФ `+N -N` from `input.cost.total_lines_added/removed`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/version.rs` тАФ `input.version`

Each module signature: `fn render(input: &StatuslineInput, config: &serde_yaml::Value) -> Option<Segment>`

Modules return `None` when their data isn't available (e.g., vim_mode when vim is off, agent when not in agent mode). The style comes from the module's config section `style` field.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `build_registry()` returns all 13 modules (10 Claude + 3 tool, tool modules can stub for now)
- [ ] Each Claude module produces correct output for representative inputs
- [ ] Each Claude module returns `None` when its data is absent
- [ ] context_bar respects bar_width and threshold config from YAML

## Tests
- [ ] Unit test for each of the 10 Claude modules with present data
- [ ] Unit test for each Claude module with absent data (returns None)
- [ ] Unit test: context_bar color thresholds (green <50, yellow <80, red >=80)
- [ ] Unit test: model name shortening (claude-opus-4-6 -> Opus 4.6)
- [ ] Unit test: cost formatting ($0.00 returns None, $1.23 renders)
- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-statusline`

changes.forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -1,34 +1,35 @@
 ## What
-Implement the module framework (registry, dispatch) and all 10 Claude modules that read data from the stdin JSON.
+Implement the module framework (registry, dispatch) and all Claude modules that read data from stdin JSON. Every module has a configurable `format` string like starship тАФ e.g., model default is `ЁЯза $name`.

 Key files:
-- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/module.rs` (new) тАФ `Segment` struct, `ModuleFn` type alias, `build_registry()` returning `HashMap<&str, ModuleFn>`
+- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/module.rs` (new) тАФ `Segment` struct, `ModuleFn` type, `build_registry()`
 - `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/mod.rs` (new) тАФ re-exports
-- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/directory.rs` тАФ basename of `input.workspace.current_dir`
-- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/model.rs` тАФ short model name from `input.model`
-- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/context_bar.rs` тАФ progress bar from `input.context_window.used_percentage` with color thresholds from config
-- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/cost.rs` тАФ `$X.XX` from `input.cost.total_cost_usd`
-- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/session.rs` тАФ first 8 chars of `input.session_id`
-- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/vim_mode.rs` тАФ NORMAL/INSERT from `input.vim.mode`
-- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/agent.rs` тАФ `input.agent.name`
-- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/worktree.rs` тАФ `input.worktree.branch` or `.name`
-- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/lines.rs` тАФ `+N -N` from `input.cost.total_lines_added/removed`
-- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/version.rs` тАФ `input.version`
+- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/directory.rs` тАФ basename of cwd, format: `$path`
+- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/model.rs` тАФ short model name, default format: `ЁЯза $name`
+- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/context_bar.rs` тАФ progress bar with color thresholds, format: `[$bar] $percentage%`
+- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/cost.rs` тАФ `$$amount`, hide_zero config
+- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/session.rs` тАФ first 8 chars, format: `$id`
+- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/vim_mode.rs` тАФ NORMAL/INSERT, format: `$mode`
+- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/agent.rs` тАФ agent name, format: `ЁЯдЦ $name`
+- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/worktree.rs` тАФ worktree branch, format: `ЁЯМ▓ $branch`
+- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/version.rs` тАФ Claude version, format: `v$version`

 Each module signature: `fn render(input: &StatuslineInput, config: &serde_yaml::Value) -> Option<Segment>`

-Modules return `None` when their data isn't available (e.g., vim_mode when vim is off, agent when not in agent mode). The style comes from the module's config section `style` field.
+Per-module format strings use the same `$variable` interpolation as the top-level format. Each module defines which variables it exposes and substitutes them before returning.

 ## Acceptance Criteria
-- [ ] `build_registry()` returns all 13 modules (10 Claude + 3 tool, tool modules can stub for now)
+- [ ] Every module has a configurable `format` field in its YAML section
+- [ ] Default formats include emoji/icons where appropriate (ЁЯза, ЁЯдЦ, ЁЯМ▓)
 - [ ] Each Claude module produces correct output for representative inputs
 - [ ] Each Claude module returns `None` when its data is absent
-- [ ] context_bar respects bar_width and threshold config from YAML
+- [ ] context_bar respects bar_width and threshold config

 ## Tests
-- [ ] Unit test for each of the 10 Claude modules with present data
+- [ ] Unit test for each of the 9 Claude modules with present data
 - [ ] Unit test for each Claude module with absent data (returns None)
+- [ ] Unit test: custom format string overrides default
 - [ ] Unit test: context_bar color thresholds (green <50, yellow <80, red >=80)
-- [ ] Unit test: model name shortening (claude-opus-4-6 -> Opus 4.6)
-- [ ] Unit test: cost formatting ($0.00 returns None, $1.23 renders)
-- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-statusline`
\ No newline at end of file
+- [ ] Unit test: model name shortening (claude-opus-4-6 -> Opus 4.6) with ЁЯза
+- [ ] Unit test: cost formatting (hide_zero, $1.23 renders)
+- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-statusline`"
\ No newline at end of file

changes.old_value:
## What
Implement the module framework (registry, dispatch) and all Claude modules that read data from stdin JSON. Every module has a configurable `format` string like starship тАФ e.g., model default is `ЁЯза $name`.

Key files:
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/module.rs` (new) тАФ `Segment` struct, `ModuleFn` type, `build_registry()`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/mod.rs` (new) тАФ re-exports
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/directory.rs` тАФ basename of cwd, format: `$path`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/model.rs` тАФ short model name, default format: `ЁЯза $name`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/context_bar.rs` тАФ progress bar with color thresholds, format: `[$bar] $percentage%`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/cost.rs` тАФ `$$amount`, hide_zero config
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/session.rs` тАФ first 8 chars, format: `$id`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/vim_mode.rs` тАФ NORMAL/INSERT, format: `$mode`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/agent.rs` тАФ agent name, format: `ЁЯдЦ $name`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/worktree.rs` тАФ worktree branch, format: `ЁЯМ▓ $branch`
- `swissarmyhammer-statusline/src/modules/version.rs` тАФ Claude version, format: `v$version`

Each module signature: `fn render(input: &StatuslineInput, config: &serde_yaml::Value) -> Option<Segment>`

Per-module format strings use the same `$variable` interpolation as the top-level format. Each module defines which variables it exposes and substitutes them before returning.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Every module has a configurable `format` field in its YAML section
- [ ] Default formats include emoji/icons where appropriate (ЁЯза, ЁЯдЦ, ЁЯМ▓)
- [ ] Each Claude module produces correct output for representative inputs
- [ ] Each Claude module returns `None` when its data is absent
- [ ] context_bar respects bar_width and threshold config

## Tests
- [ ] Unit test for each of the 9 Claude modules with present data
- [ ] Unit test for each Claude module with absent data (returns None)
- [ ] Unit test: custom format string overrides default
- [ ] Unit test: context_bar color thresholds (green <50, yellow <80, red >=80)
- [ ] Unit test: model name shortening (claude-opus-4-6 -> Opus 4.6) with ЁЯза
- [ ] Unit test: cost formatting (hide_zero, $1.23 renders)
- [ ] `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-statusline`"
STATUSLINE-4: Module framework + Claude modules (all with configurable format)
